---
applyTo: "app/**/*.tsx,components/**/*.tsx"
description: "Use when implementing frontend pages/components with API integration, typed state handling, and resilient UI states."
---

# Frontend UI Rules

- Use API routes for business data access.
- Handle loading, error, and empty states explicitly.
- Keep UI components focused and typed.
- Avoid embedding authorization/data persistence logic in client components.
- Preserve existing navigation and layout conventions.
